{{Quote|Zhul is an adept on the worldship Baanu Ghezh, and so far as I know is well.|Nen Yim|<ref name="TFP" />}}
'''''Baanu Ghezh''''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the Vong [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zhul]] Yim was stationed aboard the ''Baanu Ghezh'' as a [[Shaper Adept|shaper adept]].<ref name="TFP" />

{{Ship-stub}}
